steps.title: Read the frequency for data value 2 on the bar graph
steps.content: Locate data value 2 on the x-axis of the bar graph. The bar at data value 2 reaches a height of 6 on the frequency scale. The frequency of data value 2 is 6.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $6$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $6$.
